ocr_findings.description: Furigana readings above terms (e.g., スウォット above SWOT分析, ビーピーエム above PPM, いくさ above 現代) are present in image but absent from OCR markdown. These are decorative reading aids; content meaning is preserved.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 03-01 opening page on 経営戦略とSWOT分析. All body text captured accurately. Furigana ruby annotations not extracted by OCR but this is a known low-severity cosmetic issue. Lesson header, section headings, and all paragraphs match image faithfully.
